qa_pairs.question: What is the main purpose of this document?
qa_pairs.answer: This document provides information on where to find the status of national and legacy resources and services.

qa_pairs.question: Where can users check the status of national resources?
qa_pairs.answer: Users can check the status of national resources on the Alliancecan Status website.

qa_pairs.question: How are unplanned events updated on the national resources status page?
qa_pairs.answer: Unplanned events appear on the national resources status page when a staff member has manually taken note and updated it.

qa_pairs.question: Where should users go to find the status of legacy systems?
qa_pairs.answer: Users should consult the appropriate consortium site for the statuses of legacy systems.

qa_pairs.question: Name some of the consortium sites listed for checking legacy resources status.
qa_pairs.answer: Some of the consortium sites include SciNet, SHARCNET, Centre for Advanced Computing, and ACENET.
